<div class="relative z-10 text-center text-white p-4 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
Somatic Breathwork - Nervous System Reset Journey
Sábado 17 de Enero
🚨 Sesión dictada en INGLÉS // This session will be held in English 🚨
Una Experiencia Transformadora
Stress, Tension Release & Nervous System Grounding
This session is intentionally themed around the element of Earth — the foundation for starting the year centered, regulated, and rooted in your body.

Earth energy invites stability, safety, and presence. In this journey, we work with the body to gently release stored stress and tension, allowing your nervous system to settle and recalibrate. Rather than pushing or forcing change, we create the conditions for deep grounding, clarity, and inner steadiness.
This is an invitation to slow down, reconnect with your body, and establish a solid internal foundation from which the year can unfold with more ease and integrity.
Through somatic, trauma-informed breathwork, you’ll tap into your body’s innate capacity to release, restore, and reorganize—supporting both physical and emotional regulation.
<!-- What to Expect / What You Need Section -->
Qué Esperar

A 90-minute guided somatic breathwork journey, trauma-informed and nervous-system focused, designed to release stress, unwind tension, and support regulation through conscious breathing and embodied awareness.
Qué Necesitas
Please avoid eating at least 2 hours before the session.
Información del Evento
¡Reserva Tu Lugar Ahora!

<a href="#booking-link" class="inline-block bg-white text-indigo-700 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors duration-300 text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold py-4 px-10 rounded-full shadow-lg transform hover:scale-105">

Somatic Breathwork - Nervous System Reset Journey

Sábado 17 de Enero

🚨 Sesión dictada en INGLÉS // This session will be held in English 🚨

Una Experiencia Transformadora

BY SONJA BLODER

Stress, Tension Release & Nervous System Grounding

This session is intentionally themed around the element of Earth — the foundation for starting the year centered, regulated, and rooted in your body.

Earth energy invites stability, safety, and presence. In this journey, we work with the body to gently release stored stress and tension, allowing your nervous system to settle and recalibrate. Rather than pushing or forcing change, we create the conditions for deep grounding, clarity, and inner steadiness.

This is an invitation to slow down, reconnect with your body, and establish a solid internal foundation from which the year can unfold with more ease and integrity.

Through somatic, trauma-informed breathwork, you’ll tap into your body’s innate capacity to release, restore, and reorganize—supporting both physical and emotional regulation.

Qué Esperar

A 90-minute guided somatic breathwork journey, trauma-informed and nervous-system focused, designed to release stress, unwind tension, and support regulation through conscious breathing and embodied awareness.

Qué Necesitas

  • Yoga mat
  • Blanket
  • Water
  • Comfortable clothing

Please avoid eating at least 2 hours before the session.
